scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @dashboard/api && npm run build --workspace @dashboard/web && npm run build --workspace @dashboard/desktop
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @dashboard/api && npm run lint --workspace @dashboard/web && npm run lint --workspace @dashboard/desktop
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace @dashboard/api && npm run format --workspace @dashboard/web && npm run format --workspace @dashboard/desktop
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --workspace @dashboard/api && npm run format:check --workspace @dashboard/web && npm run format:check --workspace @dashboard/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @dashboard/api && npm run test --workspace @dashboard/web && npm run test --workspace @dashboard/desktop
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.backend:lint: python -m uv run --project apps/api ruff check . --output-format=full
scripts.backend:format: python -m uv run --project apps/api ruff format .
scripts.backend:format:check: python -m uv run --project apps/api ruff format . --check
